summary: Comprehensive testing of Billing System with PayFast integration (iteration 7). All 27 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend billing page fully verified: Overview tab shows Current Plan, Monthly Charges (with Extra Users and Add-ons breakdown), User Seats. History tab has Statement Download component with date pickers and Payment History table. Subscription status banner works correctly for past_due accounts showing grace period countdown and Make Payment button. Billing scheduler runs daily tasks successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/billing/history returns paginated payments with total, limit, skip, has_more fields
GET /api/billing/statement generates HTML with JobRocket and customer company details
GET /api/subscription/status correctly returns active/past_due/inactive status with grace_days_remaining
POST /api/billing/extra-seats creates seats with 100% pro-rata discount (R0) until billing day
GET /api/billing/account-info includes billing_day, next_billing_date, subscription dates
Billing scheduler checks PayFast subscription status daily for past_due accounts
Grace period is 7 days - account deactivated after expiry
Extra seat users with failed payments get read-only access instead of complete block
seed_data_creation: Extra seats created via API testing with pro-rata R0 amounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Billing system fully tested. Endpoints: /api/billing/history (pagination), /api/billing/statement (HTML/JSON), /api/subscription/status, /api/billing/extra-seats (pro-rata), /api/billing/account-info (billing_day). Frontend BillingPage.js has Overview, Add-Ons, Users, History tabs. StatementDownload component in History tab generates downloadable HTML statements. Subscription status banner shows for past_due accounts with grace period countdown.

billing_history_endpoint.details: Returns paginated payment list with total, limit, skip, has_more

billing_history_pagination.details: Pagination and date filters work correctly

billing_statement_html.details: Generates HTML statement with JobRocket company details

billing_statement_json.details: Returns JSON with statement_number, jobrocket_details, customer_details, payments, summary

subscription_status_active.details: Returns status=active, needs_payment=false for active accounts

subscription_status_past_due.details: Returns status=grace_period with grace_days_remaining for past_due accounts

extra_seats_prorata.details: Creates seats with R0 amount (100% pro-rata discount) until billing day

billing_account_info.details: Returns billing_day, tier_id, tier_name, subscription_status, dates

billing_summary.details: Returns monthly_data aggregation with period_months, total_paid, total_transactions

frontend_overview_tab.details: Shows Current Plan (Pro/Active), Monthly Charges breakdown, User Seats progress bar

frontend_history_tab.details: Shows Download Statement section with date pickers and Payment History table

frontend_status_banner_past_due.details: Yellow banner shows Payment Overdue with 4 days remaining and Make Payment button

billing_scheduler.details: Runs all 5 tasks: check past-due accounts, approaching billing, extra seats, addons, daily summary

mocked_integrations.payfast: PayFast API is in sandbox mode - payment webhook testing requires PayFast sandbox credentials
